name: mcp-react-toolkit
description: 54 MCP servers for React + TypeScript development automation — component scaffolding, dep auditing, WCAG checking, test generation, TypeScript enforcement, render analysis, performance audit, Lighthouse, Storybook generation, legacy app analysis, component review/fix, field-schema inference, and monorepo management.
author: Nishant Chaudhary <nishantchaudhary.dev@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build -w tools/shared && npm run build -w tools/ui-kit && npm run build -w tools/json-viewer && npm run build -w tools/infer-fields && npm run build -w tools/zod-schema-generator && npm run build -w tools/api-client-generator && npm run build -w tools/form-generator && npm run build -w tools/table-generator && npm run build -w tools/detail-generator && npm run build -w tools/crud-composer && npm run build -w tools/mcp-tool-factory && npm run build -w tools/mcp-tool-improviser && npm run build -w tools/fix-failing-tests && npm run build -w tools/component-improver && npm run build -w tools/refactor-executor && npm run build -w tools/docs-generator && npm run build -w tools/e2e-generator && npm run build -w tools/playwright-scaffolder && npm run build -w tools/visual-regression-setup && npm run build -w tools/test-data-factory && npm run build -w tools/barrel-generator && npm run build -w tools/type-from-json && npm run build -w tools/zustand-store-generator && npm run build -w tools/svg-to-component && npm run build -w tools/env-config-generator && npm run build -w tools/states-scaffolder && npm run build -w tools/i18n-extractor && npm run build -w tools/form-wizard-generator && npm run build -w tools/react-compiler-migrator && npm run build -w tools/a11y-autofixer && npm run build -w tools/codemod-runner && npm run build -w tools/bundle-budget-guard && npm run build -w tools/api-contract-differ && npm run build -w tools/craconfig-analyzer && npm run build -w tools/dependency-remapper && npm run build -w tools/redux-state-analyzer && npm run build -w tools/review-gate && npm run build -w tools/workflow-runner && npm run build -w tools/msw-mock-generator && npm run build -w tools/enforce-design-tokens && npm run build -w tools/component-factory && npm run build -w tools/code-modernizer && npm run build -w tools/quality-pipeline && npm run build -w tools/dep-auditor && npm run build -w tools/accessibility-checker && npm run build -w tools/generate-tests && npm run build -w tools/typescript-enforcer && npm run build -w tools/monorepo-manager && npm run build -w tools/render-analyzer && npm run build -w tools/storybook-generator && npm run build -w tools/performance-audit && npm run build -w tools/lighthouse-runner && npm run build -w tools/test-gap-analyzer && npm run build -w tools/component-reviewer && npm run build -w tools/component-fixer && npm run build -w tools/legacy-analyzer && npm run build -w server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w tools/ui-kit && npm run test -w tools/json-viewer && npm run test -w tools/infer-fields && npm run test -w tools/zod-schema-generator && npm run test -w tools/api-client-generator && npm run test -w tools/form-generator && npm run test -w tools/table-generator && npm run test -w tools/detail-generator && npm run test -w tools/crud-composer && npm run test -w tools/mcp-tool-factory && npm run test -w tools/mcp-tool-improviser && npm run test -w tools/fix-failing-tests && npm run test -w tools/component-improver && npm run test -w tools/refactor-executor && npm run test -w tools/docs-generator && npm run test -w tools/e2e-generator && npm run test -w tools/playwright-scaffolder && npm run test -w tools/visual-regression-setup && npm run test -w tools/test-data-factory && npm run test -w tools/barrel-generator && npm run test -w tools/type-from-json && npm run test -w tools/zustand-store-generator && npm run test -w tools/svg-to-component && npm run test -w tools/env-config-generator && npm run test -w tools/states-scaffolder && npm run test -w tools/i18n-extractor && npm run test -w tools/form-wizard-generator && npm run test -w tools/react-compiler-migrator && npm run test -w tools/a11y-autofixer && npm run test -w tools/codemod-runner && npm run test -w tools/bundle-budget-guard && npm run test -w tools/api-contract-differ && npm run test -w tools/craconfig-analyzer && npm run test -w tools/dependency-remapper && npm run test -w tools/redux-state-analyzer && npm run test -w tools/review-gate && npm run test -w tools/workflow-runner && npm run test -w tools/msw-mock-generator && npm run test -w tools/enforce-design-tokens && npm run test -w tools/quality-pipeline && npm run test -w tools/component-factory && npm run test -w tools/code-modernizer && npm run test -w tools/dep-auditor && npm run test -w tools/accessibility-checker && npm run test -w tools/generate-tests && npm run test -w tools/typescript-enforcer && npm run test -w tools/monorepo-manager && npm run test -w tools/render-analyzer && npm run test -w tools/storybook-generator && npm run test -w tools/performance-audit && npm run test -w tools/lighthouse-runner && npm run test -w tools/test-gap-analyzer && npm run test -w tools/component-reviewer && npm run test -w tools/component-fixer && npm run test -w tools/legacy-analyzer
